pyarud_detail.last_correction_report: Failed after 3 correction passes. Sadr consistently 1 mora short in taweel (20 actual vs 21 expected). Feet 3-4 have wrong weight pattern (U_U_U instead of UU_U_ for foot 3, U_UU_ instead of UU_UU_ for foot 4). The consonant skeleton بروضة دعمي فأكناف حائل does not produce enough morae for taweel meter per pyarud's analysis regardless of diacritic variations tested (case endings, tanwīn, shadda positions). آية from Imru' al-Qais's Mu'allaqa.
